questionHtml: State one reason why the side length of the cube may not always decrease at a constant rate.
markschemeHtml:
decreasing/change in coffee temperature          R1

decreasing/change in surface area of the cube

the cube breaks apart into smaller pieces

dissolution rate related to volume of the cube

 

Note: Award R1 for a reasonable explanation of a change in rate.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one reason why the side length of the cube may not always decrease at a constant rate.
